# Showdown fixtures: community | player holes separated by ';'
Ah 7d 7c 2s 9h | Ac Kd ; Ad Qc
2c 3d 9h 9s Kd | Ah Qc ; As Qd
Ah Kh Qh Jh Th | 2c 3c ; 4d 5d
Ac 2d 3h 4s 8c | 5h 9d ; 5c 6d
2h 7h 9c Td Jh | 8s Qc ; Ah 3h
Kc Kd 5h 6h 9h | Ah 2h ; Ks 5c
8c 8d 8h Qs 2c | 8s 4d ; Qd Qc
Ac Kd Kh 4c 4d | As 2c ; Ad Qs
5h 6h 7h 2c 2d | 8h 9h ; Ah Th
3c 4d 5h 6s Kd | 2c 7c ; 2h 7h ; 9d 9c
